Name: Xamarin Insights dSYM Upload
Description: Uploads a dSYM symbols file to Xamarin Insights, for more readable exceptions.

Parameters.Name: InsightsAppSpecificApiToken
Parameters.Label: Insights Api Token
Parameters.HelpText:
Your Xamarin API Key for the specific application you are uploading the symbol files to.

Visit:
https://insights.xamarin.com

Log in, browse your application, and click Settings. Your application specific API Token should be visible under "API Key".

Parameters.Name: PackageStepName
Parameters.Label: Package Step Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the previously-deployed package step that contains the dSYM symbol file that you want to deploy.

Parameters.Name: NugetSearchPath
Parameters.Label: Nuget Search Path (Optional)
Parameters.HelpText: This fully optional search path allows you to look in a specific folder path in your nuget file, such as "bin\release". This may be needed in cases when the nuget file has multiple dSYM files in different locations.
